name: Ginger Plum Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Brown the pork chops on one side.
3. Turn the chops and stir together the remaining ingredients.
4. Add the mixture to the skillet.
5. Cover the skillet, lower the heat, and simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Serve with roasted potato wedges if desired.
7. Makes 4 servings.
